# protonpass_vaults (Data Source)

Lists all Proton Pass vaults.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "protonpass_vaults" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `vaults` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vaults))

<a id="nestedatt--vaults"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vaults`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
- `share_id` (String)
- `vault_id` (String)
